calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Continued To Jul-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Continued To May-11-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederic Campagnoli for (executor) Dorothy Colapietro.

Mr. Campagnoli reported that the inventory and appraisal will be filed this week and requested a further status hearing of May 11, 2015, indicating that he will have the petition for final distribution filed by that date. The accounting status report was continued to May 11, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Continued To Mar-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederic Campagnoli for the executor.

Mr. Campagnoli reported that he ran into problems with the Inventory & Appraisal with the small stocks, he anticipates having the inventory back in March, that he can have the inventory filed but will not be able to file the final accounting by then. The accounting status report was continued to March 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-27-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-24-2014 Continued To Oct-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederic Campagnoli for Petitioner.

Mr. Campagnoli requested a four week continuance stating that by then he will file a written report and likely file a petition to close the Estate for no assets. The status hearing was continued to October 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
